label: Transparent raspberry cane motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Raspberry transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a ripe raspberry cane botanical motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A natural raspberry cane with clusters of ripe raspberry-red berries, visible drupelet texture, tiny seed-gold highlights, cane-green stems, serrated leaf-green leaves, fine thorn details, and bramble-brown woody cane segments. Botanical accuracy, crisp subject edges, rich fruit texture, no grapes.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include berries, leaves, and stems without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no grapes, no grapevine, no bowl, no hand, no props, no landscape, no text, no watermark, no loose fruit pile, no second plant species.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Raspberry light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Raspberry", derived from the visible ripe raspberry cane cutout in context. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Raspberry, Ripe Raspberry Cane, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from raspberry-red fruit, dark drupelet shadows, seed-gold highlights, cane-green stems, serrated leaf greens, cream botanical highlights, bramble-brown woody cane, and deep berry ink shadows. The board must read as raspberry, not grape.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, cream product surfaces, raspberry red primary actions, seed-gold highlight chips, cane-line dividers, leaf-green success states, bramble-brown borders, deep berry ink text, subtle raspberry drupelet seed-dot texture.
Constraints: no grapes, no grape leaves, no wine imagery, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Raspberry", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Raspberry dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Raspberry". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible ripe raspberry cane cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Raspberry, Ripe Raspberry Cane, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve the same raspberry system language as the visible light board: raspberry-red primary actions, dark berry ink backgrounds, bramble-brown surfaces and borders, cream text, seed-gold highlights, cane-green controls, leaf-green success states, cane-line dividers, raspberry drupelet seed-dot texture, 8px radius, precise shadcn/tweakcn component grid. Must read as raspberry, not grape.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep berry ink and bramble-brown dark surfaces, cream foreground, raspberry red active states, seed-gold chart highlights, cane green focus/control accents, leaf green success, subtle raspberry seed texture overlays, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no grapes, no grape leaves, no wine imagery, no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Raspberry".
